chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-291 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.6882/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.6884/2025 (Anti dated) 3. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 4. For orders on CMA No.6883/2025 (151 CPC) 5. For hearing of CMA No.2577/2025 (1R10 CPC) 6. For hearing of main case 13.10.2025 Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba Sahito, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** The matter is already fixed for 28.10.2025. However, learned counsel for the petitioner has filed an application for urgent hearing, along with an anti-dating application and an application under Section 151 CPC. Learned Additional Advocate General submits that the action has been taken by the respondents in accordance with law, as directed in the order dated 07.10.2025. Learned counsel for the petitioner confirms that, in compliance with the directions contained in the referred order, action has been taken and that the peech/Nali from Watercourse Ex-2-R, Main Rohri Canal, has now been restored. He submits that, under instructions, he does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of as not pressed, along with all pending applications. However, the respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. The observations made in the order dated 07.10.2025, insofar as they relate to action against the respondents, are hereby recalled." Let copy of this order be communication to the Secretary, Irrigation Department, Government of Sindh Karachi, for information.

However, the respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. The observations made in the order dated 07.10.2025, insofar as they relate to action against the respondents, are hereby recalled." Let copy of this order be communication to the Secretary, Irrigation Department, Government of Sindh Karachi, for information. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
